exploration_notes: All five files were confirmed in the local repo under src/hotspot/share/. The JIT compilation pipeline is: CompileBroker (AllStatic, manages compilation requests at compileBroker.hpp:165) dispatches work to CompilerThread (extends JavaThread, compilerThread.hpp:42). The actual compilation is done by two AbstractCompiler subclasses: C1's Compiler (c1_Compiler.hpp:34) for tier-1 quick compilation, and C2Compiler (c2compiler.hpp:36) for tier-2 optimizing compilation. Both include and extend Abstrac
